RemediationStrings.Title: LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock (Administrative Templates - Privacy)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\AppPrivacy\LetAppsActivateWithVoiceAboveLock must be 2. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Privacy.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoToastApplicationNotificationOnLockScreen (Administrative Templates - Privacy)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\PushNotifications\NoToastApplicationNotificationOnLockScreen must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Privacy.
